title: lotus corniculatus f. carnosus
intro: Lotus corniculatus f. carnosus, also known as the red clover, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the legume family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of lotus corniculatus f. carnosus include reducing menopausal symptoms, alleviating allergies, and supporting the immune system. Lotus corniculatus f. carnosus is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and topical creams, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
